name: Patelco Travel Rewards Visa

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. Patelco credit union may offer periodic targeted bonuses.

earning_rates.notes: 2x Patelco Rewards points per $1 on school and grocery purchases
1x point per $1 on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Visa Travel benefits
other_benefits.description: Emergency travel assistance, lost luggage reimbursement

notes: Issued by Patelco Credit Union (California-based). Earns Patelco Rewards points rather than cash back. Membership in Patelco Credit Union required (open to those who live/work in certain California counties or are affiliated with partner organizations). No annual fee and no foreign transaction fees. Note: The specific 'Travel Rewards' variant may refer to Patelco's Points Rewards World Mastercard which earns 2x on school/grocery and 1x elsewhere.
